subject: Zarude, a dark simian Pokemon with vine-like appendages, leaping aggressively forward against a jungle canopy backdrop
description: A dark-furred simian Pokemon lunges forward with claws outstretched, its body angled toward the viewer in a dynamic leaping pose. Green vine-like tendrils extend from its shoulders and frame the figure. The background shows a dense green jungle canopy with light filtering through. The card uses a holofoil treatment with a bold teal and black color scheme. The figure's red eyes are visible and its posture is aggressive and kinetic.
foreground: dark simian figure lunging forward with vine appendages and claws extended
background: dense jungle canopy with light filtering through green leaves
emotion: aggressive, fierce, mid-lunge with claws bared
